title: We welcome Dr Kevin Polden
description: BUSINESS NEWS - Dr Polden obtained his...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - Dr Polden obtained his undergraduate medical degree from the University of Pretoria in 2011, subsequently completing his internship and community service in Port Elizabeth.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - Dr Polden obtained his undergraduate medical degree from the University of Pretoria in 2011, subsequently completing his internship and community service in Port Elizabeth."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"He went on to complete his specialist surgical training at the Livingstone and Tygerberg hospitals, qualifying as a Fellow of the College of Surgeons of South Africa (FCS [SA]) in 2022."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Thereafter, he worked as a consultant surgeon at George Regional Hospital, gaining extensive experience managing both elective and emergency surgical cases.","html":"Thereafter, he worked as a consultant surgeon at George Regional Hospital, gaining extensive experience managing both elective and emergency surgical cases."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Dr Polden’s special interests include thyroid surgery, abdominal surgery, vascular surgery, trauma surgery, minimally invasive and laparoscopic surgery, surgical oncology and diagnostic and therapeutic endoscopy, including gastroscopy and colonoscopy. He has a particular interest in endoscopy, surgical oncology and laparoscopic techniques.","html":"Dr Polden’s special interests include thyroid surgery, abdominal surgery, vascular surgery, trauma surgery, minimally invasive and laparoscopic surgery, surgical oncology and diagnostic and therapeutic endoscopy, including gastroscopy and colonoscopy. He has a particular interest in endoscopy, surgical oncology and laparoscopic techniques."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Dr Polden has been actively involved in breast cancer care since 2019 through his work with the non-profit organisation Project Flamingo, reflecting his commitment to patient advocacy and community-based healthcare initiatives.","html":"Dr Polden has been actively involved in breast cancer care since 2019 through his work with the non-profit organisation Project Flamingo, reflecting his commitment to patient advocacy and community-based healthcare initiatives."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Outside of medicine, Dr Polden enjoys hiking, travelling, exploring international cuisine and studying world history.","html":"Outside of medicine, Dr Polden enjoys hiking, travelling, exploring international cuisine and studying world history."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"He is a devoted husband and family man who values balance between his professional responsibilities and personal life.","html":"He is a devoted husband and family man who values balance between his professional responsibilities and personal life."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Contact details","html":"Contact details"},{"type":"list","items":["Medico Baia Formosa, Unit 5, Muller Street, Plettenberg Bay 6600","044 533 1530","[email protected]"],"ordered":false},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
